description: Composition White,green, blue and grey striped sweater made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neck, long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs and brand logo embroidered on the ribbed hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately at less than 40 degrees Do not tumble dry or bleach Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print/trims/logo Get ready for chilly weather in this striped sweater from adidas. The long sleeves and ribbed hem adds to your feminine sporty appeal, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling warm and comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and ballerina flats for a sweet, preppy look. Model statistics The model wears size M in sweaters Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
